description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with build and deploy stages. In the build stage define two jobs, webapp and webapp:ga, both using the node:6 image, running a before_script that silently installs npm packages and copies config files, and producing a dist artifact; webapp runs `npm run build`, while webapp:ga first inserts the GA_TRACKING variable into src/App.vue with `sed -i "s#^\(.*mounted.*function.*$\)#\1\n${GA_TRACKING}#" ./src/App.vue` then runs `npm run build`. In the deploy stage add an AWS Stack job that uses alpine:3.7, runs only on master, installs python and awscli, sets THE_ENVIRONMENT and THE_STACK_NAME variables, deploys a CloudFormation stack with `aws cloudformation deploy --stack-name ${THE_STACK_NAME} --template-file devops/deploy/AWS/CloudFormation/stack.yaml --no-fail-on-empty-changeset --tags billing-project=live-dot-ganttlab-dot-org`, enables termination protection, syncs the dist folder to an S3 bucket with `aws s3 sync dist/ "s3://${THE_S3_BUCKET}" --delete`, and invalidates the CloudFront distribution with `aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id ${CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID} --paths /index.html`. Also add a Docker Hub Image job that uses the docker:git image with the docker:dind service, runs only on master, logs in to Docker Hub using DOCKER_HUB_USER and DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD, builds the Docker image with `docker build -f devops/deploy/DockerHub/Dockerfile -t "ganttlab/ganttlab-live:latest" .` and pushes it to Docker Hub. The AWS Stack job depends on webapp:ga, the Docker Hub Image job depends on webapp, and all jobs are restricted to the master branch.
